allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sharp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('csharp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('dotnet'\)\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const tb = require\('react-icons/tb'\); const keys = Object.keys\(tb\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('sharp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('csharp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('dotnet'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => /java|python|css|html|mysql|mongo|postgres|typescript|javascript|cplusplus/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const fa = require\('react-icons/fa'\); const keys = Object.keys\(fa\).filter\(k => /java/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.join\(', '\)\)")
